label: caused by
description: Disease is caused by a pathogen.

label: occurs on
description: Disease occurs on a plant part.

label: favored by
description: Disease is favored by an environment or condition.

label: transmitted by
description: Disease is transmitted by a pathway.

label: managed by
description: Disease can be managed by a measure.

label: confused with
description: Disease can be confused with another disease or stress.

label: maps to
description: Disease maps to a model class.

label: supported by
description: Disease is supported by an evidence source.

label: vector of
description: Pest is a vector of disease.
